title: Machine Learning: Theory and Practice
textbook_refs: Bishop: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning
Murphy: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction
Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman: Elements of Statistical Learning 2nd Ed

topics.title: ML Foundations: Statistical Learning Theory, PAC Learning, and VC Dimension
Bias-Variance Trade-off: Decomposition, Model Complexity, and Regularization
Gradient Descent Variants: Batch, Mini-Batch, SGD, Momentum, and AdaGrad
Regularization Techniques: L1 (Lasso), L2 (Ridge), Elastic Net, and Early Stopping
Cross-Validation: K-Fold, Stratified, Leave-One-Out, and Nested CV
Hyperparameter Tuning: Grid Search, Random Search, and Bayesian Optimization
Bayesian Linear Regression: Prior/Posterior Updates and Predictive Distribution
Gaussian Processes: Kernel Functions, Posterior Inference, and GPR/GPC
Probabilistic Graphical Models: Bayesian Networks, MRFs, and Inference Algorithms
Expectation-Maximization Algorithm: GMMs, Missing Data, and K-Means as EM
Clustering Algorithms: K-Means, DBSCAN, Hierarchical, Spectral, and Mean Shift
Anomaly Detection: Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM, and Autoencoders
Kernel Methods: Kernel Trick, Mercer's Theorem, and Kernel PCA
Gradient Boosting: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost — Algorithms and Tuning
Random Forests In-Depth: Feature Importance, OOB Error, and Extremely Randomized Trees
Multi-Label Classification: Label Powerset, Classifier Chains, and Evaluation Metrics
Imbalanced Data Handling: SMOTE, Oversampling, Undersampling, and Cost-Sensitive Learning
Survival Analysis: Kaplan-Meier Estimator, Cox Regression, and Hazard Functions
Causal Inference in ML: Do-Calculus, Propensity Scores, and Double ML
Learning-to-Rank: Pointwise, Pairwise, Listwise, and LambdaRank
Active Learning: Query Strategies, Uncertainty Sampling, and Pool-Based Selection
Semi-Supervised Learning: Label Propagation, Self-Training, and Co-Training
Multi-Task Learning: Hard Parameter Sharing, Soft Sharing, and Task Weighting
Meta-Learning: MAML, Prototypical Networks, and Few-Shot Classification
Data Preprocessing Pipelines: Imputation, Scaling, Encoding, and Pipelines
Feature Selection: Filter, Wrapper, Embedded Methods, and Mutual Information
ML Metrics for Imbalanced Classes: AUC-ROC, Precision-Recall Curve, and F1
ML Explainability: LIME, SHAP Values, Partial Dependence Plots, and Anchors
Privacy in ML: Differential Privacy, Federated Learning, and Membership Inference
Deep Learning for Tabular Data: TabNet, Entity Embeddings, and NODE
